description: fetch a user by their ID

parameters:
- name (required): Full name of the user
- email (required): Valid email address
- role (optional): 'admin' or 'user' (default: 'user')

description: delete a user by their ID

parameters:
- category (optional): Product category string (e.g. 'electronics')
- limit (optional): Max results to return (default: 20, max: 100)

description: authenticate and get an access token
parameters:
- username (required): Account username
- password (required): Account password

- id (required): Product ID to update
- name (optional): New product name
- price (optional): New price (float)
- stock (optional): Updated stock quantity

description: check the status of an order

parameters:
- user_id (required): ID of the user placing the order
- items (required): List of {product_id, quantity} objects
- shipping_address (required): Full shipping address string
